The '''Hitak Harriers''' was one of many [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] units that participated in the battles to control [[Kwymar sector/Legends|Kwymar sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

It was named after the volcanic [[Hitak mountains]] located on the planet [[Turak IV]], where the unit was responsible for defeating the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit/Legends|Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit]] during a vicious siege.
